memory.summary: The cohort is inviting me to lunch, but my plan for the assignment analysis is stuck. I'll just say yes and hope we can finish later.

desires: Not look like I'm dragging my feet or unreliable to the cohort during lunch, since they've already invited me and I don't want to feel guilty about missing out.
Get through this assignment analysis quickly so I can hit the gym later and not feel that heavy, sluggish feeling tomorrow morning.

goals.description: Join cohort_3 for lunch immediately (Mon 13:05) to avoid looking unreliable and hurt their feelings.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value is dominant; missing this invites guilt and damages trust with my close friend group. I can't let that happen, even if it delays the assignment.

goals.description: Finish assignment analysis and reading during/after lunch so I don't feel sluggish tomorrow morning.
goals.rationale: This was a top desire, but the immediate social obligation (lunch) has higher priority due to my high risk of procrastination bias and need to maintain cohesion. I'll push this back slightly to fit around the gym time later.
